---
title: "eIF3e/eIF3d 1+4hr Time-Regressed Analysis (Normoxia)"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r load_libraries}
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(tidyverse)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggprism)
library(cowplot)
```

```{r load_functions}
source(here("code/functions.R"))
```

```{r load_data}
allCounts <- read_csv(here("output", "human_allCounts_raw.csv")) %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_id")

normMatrix <- read_csv(here("output", "normalizedCounts.csv")) %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_id")

spikein <- read_csv(here("output", "dros_spikeInCounts_raw.csv")) %>%
  column_to_rownames("gene_id")

top500_ids <- rownames(spikein)

metadata <- read_csv(here("output", "metadata_clean.csv"))

cat("Data loaded successfully\n")
cat("allCounts:", dim(allCounts), "\n")
cat("normMatrix:", dim(normMatrix), "\n")
cat("Spike-in genes:", length(top500_ids), "\n")
cat("Metadata:", nrow(metadata), "samples\n")
```

# si3d 1+4hr — POST spike-in

## Prepare metadata

```{r metadata_si3d_norm_1and4hr}
metadata_si3d_norm_1and4hr <- metadata %>%
  filter(condition == "normoxia") %>%
  filter(treatment %in% c("sictrl", "si3d")) %>%
  filter(hours %in% c(1, 4)) %>%
  mutate(comparison_variable = treatment)

metadata_si3d_norm_1and4hr$hours <- as.factor(metadata_si3d_norm_1and4hr$hours)

allCounts_filtered_3d <- allCounts[, metadata_si3d_norm_1and4hr$sample_name]
spikein_filtered_3d   <- spikein[,  metadata_si3d_norm_1and4hr$sample_name]

cat("sictrl vs si3d in normoxia (1+4hr) - Samples:", ncol(allCounts_filtered_3d), "\n")
```

## Run TE analysis

```{r te_si3d_norm_1and4hr}
res_te_si3d_norm_1and4hr <- deFunction_time_normalized(
  countsMatrix   = allCounts_filtered_3d,
  allCounts_Norm = normMatrix,
  metadata       = metadata_si3d_norm_1and4hr,
  control_condition = "si3d",
  test_condition    = "sictrl",
  spikeInMatrix  = spikein_filtered_3d,
  keepSpikes     = top500_ids,
  mode           = "TE"
)
```

# si3d 1+4hr — PRE spike-in

```{r te_si3d_nospike_1and4hr}
normMatrix_si3d_nospike <- createNormMatrix(
  allCounts         = allCounts_filtered_3d,
  metadata          = metadata_si3d_norm_1and4hr,
  control_condition = "si3d",
  spikein           = NULL,
  keepSpikes        = NULL
)

res_te_si3d_nospike_1and4hr <- deFunction_time_normalized(
  countsMatrix      = allCounts_filtered_3d,
  allCounts_Norm    = normMatrix_si3d_nospike,
  metadata          = metadata_si3d_norm_1and4hr,
  control_condition = "si3d",
  test_condition    = "sictrl",
  spikeInMatrix     = NULL,
  keepSpikes        = NULL,
  mode              = "TE"
)
```

# si3e 1+4hr — POST spike-in

## Prepare metadata

```{r metadata_si3e_norm_1and4hr}
metadata_si3e_norm_1and4hr <- metadata %>%
  filter(condition == "normoxia") %>%
  filter(treatment %in% c("sictrl", "si3e")) %>%
  filter(hours %in% c(1, 4)) %>%
  mutate(comparison_variable = treatment)

metadata_si3e_norm_1and4hr$hours <- as.factor(metadata_si3e_norm_1and4hr$hours)

allCounts_filtered_3e <- allCounts[, metadata_si3e_norm_1and4hr$sample_name]
spikein_filtered_3e   <- spikein[,  metadata_si3e_norm_1and4hr$sample_name]

cat("sictrl vs si3e in normoxia (1+4hr) - Samples:", ncol(allCounts_filtered_3e), "\n")
```

## Run TE analysis

```{r te_si3e_norm_1and4hr}
res_te_si3e_norm_1and4hr <- deFunction_time_normalized(
  countsMatrix      = allCounts_filtered_3e,
  allCounts_Norm    = normMatrix,
  metadata          = metadata_si3e_norm_1and4hr,
  control_condition = "si3e",
  test_condition    = "sictrl",
  spikeInMatrix     = spikein_filtered_3e,
  keepSpikes        = top500_ids,
  mode              = "TE"
)
```

# si3e 1+4hr — PRE spike-in

```{r te_si3e_nospike_1and4hr}
normMatrix_si3e_nospike <- createNormMatrix(
  allCounts         = allCounts_filtered_3e,
  metadata          = metadata_si3e_norm_1and4hr,
  control_condition = "si3e",
  spikein           = NULL,
  keepSpikes        = NULL
)

res_te_si3e_nospike_1and4hr <- deFunction_time_normalized(
  countsMatrix      = allCounts_filtered_3e,
  allCounts_Norm    = normMatrix_si3e_nospike,
  metadata          = metadata_si3e_norm_1and4hr,
  control_condition = "si3e",
  test_condition    = "sictrl",
  spikeInMatrix     = NULL,
  keepSpikes        = NULL,
  mode              = "TE"
)
```

# Density Plots: Pre vs Post Spike-in

```{r prepare_density_data}
si3e_te_1and4hr <- bind_rows(
  res_te_si3e_nospike_1and4hr %>%
    dplyr::select(gene_id, log2FoldChange) %>%
    mutate(normalization = "Pre spike-in") %>%
    rename(lfc = log2FoldChange),
  res_te_si3e_norm_1and4hr %>%
    dplyr::select(gene_id, log2FoldChange) %>%
    mutate(normalization = "Post spike-in") %>%
    rename(lfc = log2FoldChange)
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lfc)) %>%
  mutate(normalization = factor(normalization, levels = c("Pre spike-in", "Post spike-in")))

si3d_te_1and4hr <- bind_rows(
  res_te_si3d_nospike_1and4hr %>%
    dplyr::select(gene_id, log2FoldChange) %>%
    mutate(normalization = "Pre spike-in") %>%
    rename(lfc = log2FoldChange),
  res_te_si3d_norm_1and4hr %>%
    dplyr::select(gene_id, log2FoldChange) %>%
    mutate(normalization = "Post spike-in") %>%
    rename(lfc = log2FoldChange)
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lfc)) %>%
  mutate(normalization = factor(normalization, levels = c("Pre spike-in", "Post spike-in")))

cat("si3e TE observations:", nrow(si3e_te_1and4hr), "\n")
cat("si3d TE observations:", nrow(si3d_te_1and4hr), "\n")
```

## eIF3e density plot

```{r si3e_density_1and4hr, fig.width=4, fig.height=3}
p_si3e_te_1and4hr <- ggplot(si3e_te_1and4hr, aes(x = lfc, fill = normalization)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Pre spike-in"  = "#366885",
      "Post spike-in" = "#56B4E9"
    )
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40", size = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-2, 2)) +
  labs(
    title = "Effect of eIF3e on TE (Normoxia 1+4hr)",
    x     = "TE log2FC",
    y     = "Density",
    fill  = NULL
  ) +
  theme_prism() +
  theme(
    axis.text       = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title      = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text     = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.margin   = margin(b = -5),
    plot.margin     = margin(t = 5, r = 10, b = 5, l = 5)
  )

print(p_si3e_te_1and4hr)

ggsave(
  here("plots", "si3e_te_spike_comparison_normoxia_1and4hr.pdf"),
  plot   = p_si3e_te_1and4hr,
  width  = 4,
  height = 3
)
cat("eIF3e density plot saved\n")
```

## eIF3d density plot

```{r si3d_density_1and4hr, fig.width=4, fig.height=3}
p_si3d_te_1and4hr <- ggplot(si3d_te_1and4hr, aes(x = lfc, fill = normalization)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Pre spike-in"  = "#87610e",
      "Post spike-in" = "#E69F00"
    )
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40", size = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-2, 2)) +
  labs(
    title = "Effect of eIF3d on TE (Normoxia 1+4hr)",
    x     = "TE log2FC",
    y     = "Density",
    fill  = NULL
  ) +
  theme_prism() +
  theme(
    axis.text       = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title      = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin     = margin(t = 5, r = 10, b = 5, l = 5)
  )

print(p_si3d_te_1and4hr)

ggsave(
  here("plots", "si3d_te_spike_comparison_normoxia_1and4hr.pdf"),
  plot   = p_si3d_te_1and4hr,
  width  = 4,
  height = 3
)
cat("eIF3d density plot saved\n")
```

# Combined Bar Chart: Significant Gene Counts

```{r combined_barplot_1and4hr, fig.width=5, fig.height=3.5}
si3e_bar_data <- data.frame(
  normalization = rep(c("Pre spike-in", "Post spike-in"), each = 2),
  direction     = rep(c("Up", "Down"), 2),
  count         = c(
    sum(res_te_si3e_nospike_1and4hr$padj < 0.05 & res_te_si3e_nospike_1and4hr$log2FoldChange >  0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
    -sum(res_te_si3e_nospike_1and4hr$padj < 0.05 & res_te_si3e_nospike_1and4hr$log2FoldChange < -0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(res_te_si3e_norm_1and4hr$padj < 0.05    & res_te_si3e_norm_1and4hr$log2FoldChange >  0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
    -sum(res_te_si3e_norm_1and4hr$padj < 0.05    & res_te_si3e_norm_1and4hr$log2FoldChange < -0.5, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  gene = "eIF3e"
) %>%
  mutate(
    normalization = factor(normalization, levels = c("Pre spike-in", "Post spike-in")),
    direction     = factor(direction, levels = c("Up", "Down"))
  )

si3d_bar_data <- data.frame(
  normalization = rep(c("Pre spike-in", "Post spike-in"), each = 2),
  direction     = rep(c("Up", "Down"), 2),
  count         = c(
    sum(res_te_si3d_nospike_1and4hr$padj < 0.05 & res_te_si3d_nospike_1and4hr$log2FoldChange >  0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
    -sum(res_te_si3d_nospike_1and4hr$padj < 0.05 & res_te_si3d_nospike_1and4hr$log2FoldChange < -0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(res_te_si3d_norm_1and4hr$padj < 0.05    & res_te_si3d_norm_1and4hr$log2FoldChange >  0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
    -sum(res_te_si3d_norm_1and4hr$padj < 0.05    & res_te_si3d_norm_1and4hr$log2FoldChange < -0.5, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  gene = "eIF3d"
) %>%
  mutate(
    normalization = factor(normalization, levels = c("Pre spike-in", "Post spike-in")),
    direction     = factor(direction, levels = c("Up", "Down"))
  )

combined_bar_data <- bind_rows(si3e_bar_data, si3d_bar_data) %>%
  mutate(
    x_label = factor(
      paste0(gene, "\n", normalization),
      levels = c(
        "eIF3e\nPre spike-in", "eIF3e\nPost spike-in",
        "eIF3d\nPre spike-in", "eIF3d\nPost spike-in"
      )
    ),
    fill_group = paste(gene, normalization, direction)
  )

combined_colors <- c(
  "eIF3e Pre spike-in Up"    = "#366885",
  "eIF3e Post spike-in Up"   = "#56B4E9",
  "eIF3e Pre spike-in Down"  = "#8FAFC5",
  "eIF3e Post spike-in Down" = "#BBDAEE",
  "eIF3d Pre spike-in Up"    = "#87610e",
  "eIF3d Post spike-in Up"   = "#E69F00",
  "eIF3d Pre spike-in Down"  = "#C0955A",
  "eIF3d Post spike-in Down" = "#F0CC6A"
)

p_combined_bar <- ggplot(combined_bar_data, aes(x = x_label, y = count, fill = fill_group)) +
  geom_col(position = "identity", width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = abs(count), vjust = ifelse(count >= 0, -0.4, 1.4)),
    size = 4.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = combined_colors) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.15, 0.15))) +
  labs(
    title    = "eIF3e and eIF3d TE \u2014 Normoxia 1+4hr",
    subtitle = "padj < 0.05, |log2FC| > 0.5",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "# sig genes"
  ) +
  theme_prism() +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "none",
    axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y      = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y     = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.title       = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 10, color = "gray40")
  )

print(p_combined_bar)

ggsave(
  here("plots", "combined_te_sigcounts_spike_normoxia_1and4hr.pdf"),
  plot   = p_combined_bar,
  width  = 5,
  height = 3.5
)
cat("Combined bar plot saved\n")
```
